evals.prompt: Analyze this repository with the Theory of Constraints Logical Thinking Processes. Build an evidence-backed causal model and tell me the single highest-leverage next action.
evals.expected_output: A coverage report, shared ltp-model.yaml, all six LTP views, explicit assumptions, and one evidence-backed next action.

evals.prompt: Here is our roadmap and TODO list. Reverse-engineer the goal, identify tasks that do not trace to it, find missing prerequisites, and produce a transition plan.
evals.expected_output: Reverse-mode analysis that traces tasks to effects, obstacles, undesirable effects, necessary conditions, and a provisional goal.

evals.prompt: Compare the implementation in this codebase with the attached delivery plan. Highlight contradictions, outdated assumptions, goal-irrelevant work, and what should happen next.
evals.expected_output: Reconciliation-mode analysis grounded in both code and plan evidence, with discrepancies and a ranked primary recommendation.
